message:
✨ Use user's personal GitHub token for rewards when available (#1200)

Prefer the user's personal GitHub token from Settings over the server-side
FEEDBACK_GITHUB_TOKEN PAT. This gives users with a configured token better
rate limits and access to private repo contributions. Falls back to the
server PAT if no personal token is set.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
